title: Pride in Place Survey - Grahame Morris MP
headings: h2: Grahame Morris MP Working for Easington
h2: Pride in Place – £20m Investment for Peterlee
text_excerpt: Pride in Place Survey - Grahame Morris MP Join Get Involved Donate Grahame Morris MP Working for Easington About Latest News Debates & Questions Tweets@GrahameMorris Contact Twitter Facebook Youtube Pride in Place Survey 19th March, 2026 Peterlee Pride in Place Pride in Place – £20m Investment for Peterlee I’m delighted that Peterlee has been selected for the Government’s Pride in Place programme, securing £20 million of investment over the next ten years. This is a major opportunity for our town and your voice will shape how this funding is used. How should we invest this money to make the biggest difference? Please take a few minutes to complete this short survey and share your views. Your feedback will help guide decisions and ensure this investment delivers real benefits for Peterlee and our community. Peterlee Pride in Place Peterlee Pride in Place Name (Required) First Last Email (Required) Address (Required) Postcode (Required) 1. How long have you lived in Peterlee? (Required) Less than one year 1-5 years 5-10 years More than ten years 2. What do you enjoy most about living here? (For example - community spirit, green spaces, local facilities, location) 3. Which of the following issues should be prioritised in your area? (Please select up to three.) (Required) Roads, pavements and street maintenance Crime and community safety Public Transport Community facilities and local services Parks, playgrounds and green spaces Health and care services Housing and regeneration Education, skills and employment support Culture, sport and leisure facilities Other If you selected “Other”, please specify: 4. If funding were available, what is the one improvement that would make the biggest difference in your neighbourhood? 5. Which local groups are already doing valuable work in the area? Who should be involved in future decisions or planning improvements? Do you have any other comments or suggestions you would like to share about Peterlee Pride in Place Share — Social channels Twitter Facebook Youtube Contact details Constituency Office Seaton Holme Hall Walks Easington County Durham, SR8 3BS Constituency Office Seaton Holme Hall Walks Easington County Durham, SR8 3BS '> View on Google Maps Email: grahame.morris.mp@parliament.uk Further details Promoted by Grahame Morris at Constituency Office, Seaton Holme, Hall Walks, Easington, County Durham, SR8 3BS ©2026 Copyright Labour All rights reserved.
